retry_reason: The refcount_inc operation is unconditional and always succeeds (assuming the refcount is not already zero, which would indicate a bug). There is no failure path, so retry is never needed.
contract_summary: Unconditional get-wrapper: acquires a reference on a devlink_rel object by incrementing its refcount. The caller must ensure that a corresponding put operation (e.g., devlink_rel_put) is called when the reference is no longer needed. This function does not transfer ownership of the pointer itself; it merely increases the refcount to extend the object's lifetime. No locks or RCU protection are required based on this function alone.
